scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/vizform-vanilla-d3 && npm run build -w packages/vizform-react-d3 && npm run build -w apps/sliceboard
scripts.dev: concurrently -n sliceboard,vanilla-bireactive,svelte-layerchart,vanilla-bireactive-layercharts,vanilla-bireactive-native-layout "npm run dev -w apps/sliceboard" "npm run dev -w apps/vanilla-bireactive-spike" "npm run dev -w apps/svelte-layerchart-spike" "npm run dev -w apps/vanilla-bireactive-layercharts-spike" "npm run dev -w apps/vanilla-bireactive-native-layout-spike"
